$comment: PRD-602-R24 / PRD-106-R20 — overlapping prefixes MUST be rejected at createBridge construction time. The prefix '/docs/v2' is a strict path-segment-aware prefix-extension of '/docs', which violates PRD-106-R20 mounts coherence. The bridge throws BridgeConfigurationError with code OVERLAPPING_PREFIXES; no request is served.
